artifacts.name: Mystic Orb
artifacts.description: After commits conclude, 30% chance to cast Third Eye Awakening for free.
artifacts.rulesText: After commits conclude, 30% chance to cast Third Eye Awakening for free.

artifacts.name: Invocation Staff
artifacts.description: After commits conclude, 30% chance to cast a random invocation for free.
artifacts.rulesText: After commits conclude, 30% chance to cast a random invocation for free (fizzles if unusable).

artifacts.name: Giant Crystal
artifacts.description: Permanent +5 power in every Challenge and +1 to all dice rolls.
artifacts.rulesText: Permanent +5 power in every Challenge and +1 to all dice rolls.

artifacts.name: Lucky Beads
artifacts.description: +1 Game Card when meditating and +1 to all dice rolls.
artifacts.rulesText: +1 Game Card when meditating and +1 to all dice rolls.

artifacts.name: Stone of Balance
artifacts.description: At Challenge resolution, if you committed 2+ different card types, gain +5 AP.
artifacts.rulesText: At Challenge resolution, if you committed 2+ different card types (Human, Plant, Animal, Cosmic), gain +5 AP.

artifacts.name: Reincarnation Crystal
artifacts.description: When the Worldseed ritual removes your cards, gain a random replacement Game Card.
artifacts.rulesText: When the Worldseed ritual removes your Cosmic cards, gain a random replacement Game Card.

artifacts.name: Sacred Plant Seed
artifacts.description: +5 power for every Plant Game Card you play in a Challenge.
artifacts.rulesText: +5 power for every Plant Game Card you play in a Challenge.

artifacts.name: Magnetic Crystal
artifacts.description: Gain 2 Crystals from Mountain Journey rewards.
artifacts.rulesText: Gain 2 Crystals from Mountain Journey rewards.

artifacts.name: Spirit Totem
artifacts.description: At the start of each Challenge, summon 1 random Game Card as an extra face-up card (50% chance).
artifacts.rulesText: At the start of each Challenge, summon 1 random Game Card as an extra face-up card (50% chance).

artifacts.name: Extra Terrestrial Artifact
artifacts.description: Each time you gain Teachings, gain +1 extra Basic Teaching.
artifacts.rulesText: Each time you gain Teachings, gain +1 extra Basic Teaching.

artifacts.name: Crystal Seeker Goggles
artifacts.description: Whenever you resolve a Cave Journey, gain +1 Crystal.
artifacts.rulesText: Whenever you resolve a Cave Journey, gain +1 Crystal.

artifacts.name: Mysterious Totem
artifacts.description: Set your lowest-power committed Game Card to 15 AP. If that card is an Animal, set it to 18 instead.
artifacts.rulesText: Set your lowest-power committed Game Card to 15 AP. If that card is an Animal, set it to 18 instead.

artifacts.name: Cosmic Robes
artifacts.description: If you play 1+ Human cards, 30% chance to cast Empower the Meek for free.
artifacts.rulesText: If you play 1+ Human Game Cards in a Challenge, 30% chance to cast Empower the Meek for free.

artifacts.name: Verdant Seed Pod
artifacts.description: When you meditate, 40% chance to gain +1 Game Card. If the card is a Plant, also gain +1 Crystal.
artifacts.rulesText: When you meditate, 40% chance to gain +1 Game Card. If the card is a Plant, also gain +1 Crystal.

artifacts.name: Celestial Compass
artifacts.description: At the start of each Challenge, 50% chance to add the top game deck card as an extra face-up card.
artifacts.rulesText: At the start of each Challenge, 50% chance to add the top game deck card as an extra face-up card.

artifacts.name: Ancestor's Drum
artifacts.description: When you cast an Invocation in a Challenge, gain +3 AP. Once per challenge.
artifacts.rulesText: When you cast an Invocation in a Challenge, gain +3 AP. Once per challenge.

artifacts.name: Crown of Stars
artifacts.description: Permanent +2 to all dice rolls. When you reach a TP threshold in a challenge, gain +2 Crystals.
artifacts.rulesText: Permanent +2 to all dice rolls. When you reach a TP threshold in a challenge, gain +2 Crystals.

artifacts.name: Mentor's Medallion
artifacts.description: Each Game Card you commit grants +2 bonus Challenge TP.
artifacts.rulesText: Each Game Card you commit grants +2 bonus Challenge TP. Accelerates your path to teachings.

artifacts.name: Tome of Enlightenment
artifacts.description: Your TP thresholds are reduced by 3 from their current values.
artifacts.rulesText: Your TP thresholds are reduced by 3 from their current values. Reach teachings faster.

artifacts.name: Scroll of Accumulated Wisdom
artifacts.description: Each TP threshold you cross grants +1 Crystal.
artifacts.rulesText: Each TP threshold you cross grants +1 Crystal. Teaching progress rewards material gain.

artifacts.name: Elder's Signet
artifacts.description: When you reach a TP threshold, gain +5 AP.
artifacts.rulesText: When you reach a TP threshold, gain +5 AP. Wisdom translates to power.
